question_text: Is the codebase structured so CPU-only or single-GPU inference is feasible, or is it fundamentally tied to TPU / JAX distributed training? Cite the dependency declarations or hardware-specific code paths.

quick_check_verdict.notes: "Stack is JAX/EasyDeL/Orbax — JAX itself supports CPU/GPU/TPU so single-device inference is technically feasible, but EasyDeL is a distributed-training framework and no explicit CPU/single-GPU inference entrypoint was surfaced in this quick check; confirming feasibility would require inspecting the actual model/inference scripts for hardcoded mesh/sharding assumptions.
